## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] I've added tests for my changes
- [ ] I've run `npm run lint` and fixed any issues
- [ ] I've run `npm run test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I've added a changeset (`npx changeset`) if this changes package behavior
